title: WU 2.6-4: Sweep + tag m1-phase02-6
description: Final verification. Clean build, opcodes count higher by 8. Sanity-check FUSE 07/0F/17/1F/27/2F/37/3F all pass. Tag m1-phase02-6. Plan WU 2.6-4. Epic: zx80-469.

title: WU 2.6-3: Daa + Cpl + Scf + Ccf (4 misc opcodes)
description: Four singleton Op classes in op/misc/. Opcodes 0x27 (DAA), 0x2F (CPL), 0x37 (SCF), 0x3F (CCF). All 4T. CCF sets H to OLD C (counterintuitive — test it). DAA delegates to Flags.afterDaa (per-edge correctness covered by FlagsTest). Extend MiscOps + MiscOpsTest. ~12 tests. Plan WU 2.6-3. Epic: zx80-469.

title: WU 2.6-2: Rlca + Rrca + Rla + Rra (4 rotate-A opcodes)
description: Four singleton Op classes in op/rot/. Opcodes 0x07 (RLCA), 0x0F (RRCA), 0x17 (RLA), 0x1F (RRA). All 4T, preserve S/Z/PV. RLA/RRA fold OLD C bit IN as new low/high bit (test with C=1). Create new RotOps fragment + wire into OpTableBuilder. ~17 tests. Plan WU 2.6-2. Epic: zx80-469.

title: WU 2.6-1: Flags helpers (afterRotateA, afterDaa, afterCpl, afterScf, afterCcf)
description: Foundation for Phase 2.6. Add 5 Flags helpers. afterRotateA preserves S/Z/PV, sets C from newC, clears H/N. afterDaa is the BCD-adjust algorithm (~30 LOC, 8+ boundary tests covering add/sub paths, half-carry, full-byte overflow). afterCpl preserves S/Z/PV/C, sets H/N. afterScf and afterCcf return Int (just new F; A unchanged). ~30 new tests with most density on DAA. Plan WU 2.6-1. Epic: zx80-469.

title: Phase 2.6: rotates on A + DAA/CPL/SCF/CCF
description: Implement 8 main-table single-byte opcodes operating on A or flags: RLCA, RRCA, RLA, RRA, DAA, CPL, SCF, CCF. Foundation: 5 Flags helpers including afterDaa (standard table-based BCD-adjust algorithm with dense per-boundary testing). Spec: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-02-zx80-m1-phase2-6-rotates-a-and-misc-design.md. Plan: docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-02-zx80-m1-phase2-6-rotates-a-and-misc.md. Phase 2.5 (epic zx80-2uy) must complete first. End milestone tag: m1-phase02-6.

title: WU 2.5-1: RegPair extension (AF + fromPushPopBits) + StackOps skeleton
description: Foundation for Phase 2.5. Add 5th RegPair value AF (read/writes cpu.af). Add fromPushPopBits(bits) companion (00=BC, 01=DE, 10=HL, 11=AF). Existing fromBits unchanged (still maps 11=SP). Create empty StackOps fragment + wire into OpTableBuilder. ~6 new tests. No Op classes. Plan WU 2.5-1. Epic: zx80-2uy.

title: WU 2.5-2: PushPair + PopPair (8 opcodes)
description: Two Op classes: PushPair(src) at 0xC5/D5/E5/F5 (11T); PopPair(dst) at 0xC1/D1/E1/F1 (10T). Both parameterized over RegPair, both reject SP via init guard. Use cpu.push/cpu.pop from Phase 2.4. POP AF loads F directly from popped low byte (test verifies). Fill in StackOps installer + StackOpsTest. ~14 new tests. Plan WU 2.5-2. Epic: zx80-2uy.

title: WU 2.5-3: Sweep + tag m1-phase02-5
description: Final verification. Clean build, opcodes count higher by 8. Sanity-check FUSE C5 case (PUSH BC) is not in failures. Tag m1-phase02-5. Plan WU 2.5-3. Epic: zx80-2uy.

title: Phase 2.5: PUSH/POP rr
description: Implement Z80 16-bit stack push/pop for register pairs (PUSH/POP BC/DE/HL/AF). 8 opcodes across 2 Op classes. Reuses Cpu.push/pop helpers from Phase 2.4. Foundation: extend RegPair enum with AF value + fromPushPopBits helper (PUSH/POP encoding differs from LD rr,nn). Spec: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-02-zx80-m1-phase2-5-push-pop-design.md. Plan: docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-02-zx80-m1-phase2-5-push-pop.md. Phase 2.4 (epic zx80-b5i) must complete first. End milestone tag: m1-phase02-5.

title: WU 2.4-5: RET + RST family (17 opcodes)
description: Three Op classes: Ret (0xC9, 10T, pops pc), RetCc(cond) (8 opcodes 0xC0/C8/D0/D8/E0/E8/F0/F8, 5 not-taken/11 taken), Rst(target) (8 opcodes 0xC7/CF/D7/DF/E7/EF/F7/FF; pushes pc+1; target must be one of 0x00/08/10/18/20/28/30/38; 11T). Mnemonic for RST is e.g. 'RST 18H'. Extend BranchOps + BranchOpsTest. ~22 new tests. Plan WU 2.4-5. Epic: zx80-b5i.

title: WU 2.4-4: CALL family (9 opcodes)
description: Two Op classes: CallAbs (0xCD, 17T, pushes pc+3 then jumps), CallAbsCc(cond) (8 opcodes 0xC4/CC/D4/DC/E4/EC/F4/FC, 10 not-taken/17 taken; push happens only on taken branch). Always reads nn even when not taken. Extend BranchOps + BranchOpsTest. ~13 new tests. Plan WU 2.4-4. Epic: zx80-b5i.

title: WU 2.4-6: Sweep + tag m1-phase02-4
description: Final verification. Clean build, capture exact zx80 score headline (opcodes count higher by 42). Sanity-check FUSE C3 case (JP nn) is not in failures. Tag m1-phase02-4. Plan WU 2.4-6. Epic: zx80-b5i.

title: WU 2.4-1: Condition enum + Cpu.push/pop + BranchOps skeleton
description: Foundation for Phase 2.4. Create Condition enum (8 codes: NZ/Z/NC/C/PO/PE/P/M) with test(cpu), fromBits(0..7). Create Cpu.push(mem,value) and Cpu.pop(mem):Int extension methods (pre-decrement push, post-increment pop, little-endian, SP wraps). Create empty BranchOps fragment + wire into OpTableBuilder. ~18 new tests. No Op classes. Plan WU 2.4-1. Epic: zx80-b5i.

title: WU 2.4-3: JR + DJNZ family (6 opcodes, signed displacement)
description: Three Op classes: JrRel (0x18, 12T), JrRelCc(cond) (4 opcodes 0x20/28/30/38; only NZ/Z/NC/C valid; 7 not-taken/12 taken), Djnz (0x10; decrements B WITHOUT updating flags; 8 not-taken/13 taken). Displacement is signed 8-bit (mem.read().toByte().toInt()). Extend BranchOps + BranchOpsTest. ~20 new tests. Plan WU 2.4-3. Epic: zx80-b5i.

title: WU 2.4-2: JP family (10 opcodes)
description: Three Op classes: JpAbs (0xC3, 10T), JpAbsCc(cond) (8 opcodes 0xC2/CA/D2/DA/E2/EA/F2/FA, 10T constant taken/not-taken), JpHl (0xE9, 4T). JpHl sets pc=cpu.hl (NOT memory[HL]). Extend BranchOps + BranchOpsTest. ~17 new tests. Plan WU 2.4-2. Epic: zx80-b5i.

title: Phase 2.4: jumps, calls, returns
description: Implement Z80 control-flow opcodes: JP, JR, DJNZ, CALL, RET, RST and conditional variants. 42 new opcode positions across 11 Op classes. None affect flags. Foundation: Condition enum + Cpu.push/pop helpers. Spec: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-02-zx80-m1-phase2-4-jumps-calls-design.md. Plan: docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-02-zx80-m1-phase2-4-jumps-calls.md. Phase 2.3 (epic zx80-vt6) must complete first. End milestone tag: m1-phase02-4.

title: WU 2.3-4: AdcHlPair + SbcHlPair (8 ED-prefixed opcodes)
description: Two Op classes parameterized over RegPair, ED-prefixed. 8 opcodes (ADC HL,rr at ED 0x4A/0x5A/0x6A/0x7A; SBC HL,rr at ED 0x42/0x52/0x62/0x72). PC+=2, R+=2 (cpu.bumpR(2)), 15 T-states. Full flag update. Extend AluOps + AluOpsTest. ~12 tests. Plan WU 2.3-4. Epic: zx80-vt6.

title: WU 2.3-3: IncPair + DecPair (8 opcodes, NO flag changes)
description: Two Op classes parameterized over RegPair. 4+4=8 opcodes (INC rr at 0x03/0x13/0x23/0x33; DEC rr at 0x0B/0x1B/0x2B/0x3B). 6 T-states. CRITICAL: 16-bit INC/DEC do NOT affect any flag (unlike 8-bit INC/DEC which preserve only C). Tests set f=0xFF before and assert f=0xFF after. Extend AluOps + AluOpsTest. ~12 tests. Plan WU 2.3-3. Epic: zx80-vt6.

title: WU 2.3-5: Sweep + tag m1-phase02-3
description: Final verification. Clean build, capture exact zx80 score headline (opcodes count higher by 20). Sanity-check FUSE 09 case (ADD HL,BC) is not in failures. Tag m1-phase02-3. Plan WU 2.3-5. Epic: zx80-vt6.

title: WU 2.3-2: AddHlPair (4 opcodes for ADD HL,rr)
description: AddHlPair(src) parameterized over RegPair. 4 opcodes (0x09 BC, 0x19 DE, 0x29 HL, 0x39 SP). 11 T-states. CRITICAL: explicit test asserts S/Z/PV preserved from oldF; ADD HL only touches H/N/C. Extend AluOps + AluOpsTest. ~7 tests. Plan WU 2.3-2. Epic: zx80-vt6.

title: WU 2.3-1: Flags 16-bit helpers (afterAddWord, afterAdcWord, afterSbcWord)
description: Foundation for Phase 2.3. Extend Flags with 3 helpers: afterAddWord (preserves S/Z/PV from oldF; computes H from bit 11, N=0, C from bit 15), afterAdcWord (full flag update, includes carry-in folding), afterSbcWord (full flag update, N=1, includes borrow-in). All return AluResult. ~13 new tests covering boundaries (0x0FFF→H, 0x7FFF→V/S, 0xFFFF→C/Z). No Op classes. Plan WU 2.3-1. Epic: zx80-vt6.

title: Phase 2.3: 16-bit arithmetic
description: Implement Z80 16-bit arithmetic on register pairs: ADD HL,rr, INC rr, DEC rr, ADC HL,rr, SBC HL,rr. 20 new opcode positions across 5 Op classes. INC/DEC pair don't touch flags (unique). ADD HL,rr has partial flag update (S/Z/PV preserved from oldF). ADC/SBC HL,rr are ED-prefixed (R+=2, 15 T-states). Spec: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-02-zx80-m1-phase2-3-arithmetic-16bit-design.md. Plan: docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-02-zx80-m1-phase2-3-arithmetic-16bit.md. Phase 2.2 (epic zx80-fg9) must complete first. End milestone tag: m1-phase02-3.

title: WU 2.2-6: Sweep + tag m1-phase02-2
description: Final verification. Clean build, capture exact zx80 score headline (target ~0.6+ with opcodes count higher by 88). Sanity-check FUSE 80 case (ADD A,B) is not in failures — if it is, afterAdd flag computation has a bug. Tag m1-phase02-2. Plan WU 2.2-6 section. Epic: zx80-fg9.

title: WU 2.2-5: INC and DEC (16 opcodes)
description: Four Op classes: IncReg(dst), IncHlMem, DecReg(dst), DecHlMem. 7 + 1 + 7 + 1 = 16 opcodes. CRITICAL: C flag preserved (unique to INC/DEC). N cleared by INC, set by DEC. 4 T-states for register variants, 11 for (HL). Extend AluOps fragment + AluOpsTest. ~19 new tests. Plan WU 2.2-5 section. Epic: zx80-fg9.

title: WU 2.2-4: AluAImm (8 ALU A,n immediate opcodes)
description: AluAImm(op) covers 8 opcodes: 0xC6, 0xCE, 0xD6, 0xDE, 0xE6, 0xEE, 0xF6, 0xFE. 7 T-states, operandLength=1. Reads immediate from mem[pc+1]. Extend AluOps fragment + AluOpsTest. ~5 new tests. Plan WU 2.2-4 section. Epic: zx80-fg9.

title: WU 2.2-3: AluAFromHl (8 ALU A,(HL) opcodes)
description: AluAFromHl(op) covers 8 opcodes: 0x86, 0x8E, 0x96, 0x9E, 0xA6, 0xAE, 0xB6, 0xBE. 7 T-states. Reads byte at HL as second operand. Extend AluOps fragment + AluOpsTest. ~5 new tests. Plan WU 2.2-3 section. Epic: zx80-fg9.

title: WU 2.2-1: Flags helpers + AluResult + AluOp enum
description: Foundation for Phase 2.2. Add AluResult data class. Extend Flags object with afterAdd/afterSub/afterAnd/afterOr/afterXor/afterInc/afterDec helpers + parity utility, all returning AluResult. Add AluOp enum (ADD/ADC/SUB/SBC/AND/OR/XOR/CP) with apply(a,b,oldF) dispatch + fromBits(bits) helper (note Z80 ooo encoding: XOR at 5, OR at 6). ~53 new tests. No Op classes yet. Plan WU 2.2-1 section. Epic: zx80-fg9.

title: WU 2.2-2: AluAReg (56 ALU A,r opcodes in 0x80-0xBF block)
description: Big WU. AluAReg parameterized over (op: AluOp, src: Reg) covers 56 opcodes (rrr=110 (HL) variants skipped, handled later). CP correctly leaves A unchanged. Create AluOps fragment + wire into OpTableBuilder. ~13 new tests. Plan WU 2.2-2 section. Epic: zx80-fg9.

title: Phase 2.2: 8-bit ALU + INC/DEC
description: Implement the 8-bit Z80 ALU family on A (ADD/ADC/SUB/SBC/AND/OR/XOR/CP across reg/(HL)/immediate sources) plus INC/DEC for 8-bit operands. ~88 new opcode positions across 7 Op classes. First batch with real flag computation. Spec: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-02-zx80-m1-phase2-2-arithmetic-design.md. Plan: docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-02-zx80-m1-phase2-2-arithmetic.md. Phase 2.1b (epic zx80-4gm) must complete first. End milestone tag: m1-phase02-2.

title: WU 2.1b-6: Sweep + tag m1-phase02-1b
description: Final verification. Clean build, capture exact zx80 score headline (target ~SCORE: 0.4xx with opcodes 94/1792). Sanity-check FUSE 40 case (LD B,B) is not in failures. Tag m1-phase02-1b. Plan WU 2.1b-6 section. Epic: zx80-4gm.

title: WU 2.1b-5: LD with memory addresses (8 opcodes)
description: LdAFromBcDe + LdBcDeFromA parameterized over RegPair.BC/DE (validates pair). LdAFromAddr (LD A,(nn) at 0x3A), LdAddrFromA (LD (nn),A at 0x32), LdHlFromAddr (LD HL,(nn) at 0x2A), LdAddrFromHl (LD (nn),HL at 0x22). Uses Memory.readWord/writeWord. ~22 new tests. Plan WU 2.1b-5 section. Epic: zx80-4gm.

title: WU 2.1b-4: LD rr,nn family (16-bit immediate to pair) + Memory.readWord helpers
description: 4 opcodes (LD BC/DE/HL/SP, nn at 0x01/0x11/0x21/0x31). LdPairImm parameterized over RegPair. Also: add Memory.readWord(addr) and Memory.writeWord(addr, value) helpers (little-endian; will be used here and by WU 2.1b-5's address ops). ~9 new tests. Plan WU 2.1b-4 section. Epic: zx80-4gm.

title: WU 2.1b-3: LD r,n family (immediate to register + LD (HL),n)
description: 8 opcode positions. LdRegImm(dst) parameterized for 7 LD r,n opcodes (0x06, 0x0E, 0x16, 0x1E, 0x26, 0x2E, 0x3E). LdHlMemImm singleton for LD (HL),n (0x36). Extend LdOps fragment + LdOpsTest. ~10 new tests. Plan WU 2.1b-3 section. Epic: zx80-4gm.

title: WU 2.1b-2: LD r,r' family (the 0x40-0x7F block)
description: 63 opcode positions: LdRegReg parameterized over (src, dst) covers 49 reg-to-reg combos; LdRegFromHl(dst) covers the 7 LD r,(HL) variants; LdHlFromReg(src) covers the 7 LD (HL),r variants. HALT slot at 0x76 must be skipped (collision with MiscOps). Also: create LdOps fragment + wire into OpTableBuilder. ~17 new tests. Plan WU 2.1b-2 section. Epic: zx80-4gm.

title: WU 2.1b-1: Reg.fromBits + RegPair foundation
description: Foundation for Phase 2.1b LD family. Add Reg.fromBits(bits) companion helper (maps Z80 r-field 0..7 to Reg, throws on bits=6 = (HL)). Create new RegPair enum (BC/DE/HL/SP) with read/write/fromBits. Update Op.operandLength KDoc to clarify 'informational; Op owns PC advance'. No new Op classes; ~9 new tests. Plan: docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-02-zx80-m1-phase2-1b-ld-family.md WU 2.1b-1 section. Epic: zx80-4gm.

title: Phase 2.1b: LD instruction family
description: Implement the entire Z80 LD instruction family — ~80 new opcode positions across ~12 Op classes. Spec: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-02-zx80-m1-phase2-1b-ld-family-design.md. Plan: docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-02-zx80-m1-phase2-1b-ld-family.md. After this epic completes, opcodes count climbs from 11 to ~94 and composite score moves from 0.106 to roughly 0.35-0.50. End milestone tag: m1-phase02-1b.
